summary: Backend (17/17 pytest tests passed) and Frontend e2e flows tested: login, dashboard, inventory add, suppliers add, POS, employees, reports. All major flows working. Minor non-blocking warnings noted.

minor.issue: FastAPI CORSMiddleware uses allow_origins=[FRONTEND_URL, '*'] with allow_credentials=True. Browsers reject wildcard with credentials. Currently works because frontend uses same-origin proxy. Recommend removing '*' and keeping only explicit FRONTEND_URL.

Endpoint runs find() twice (first with projection, then iterates all users again) - inefficient duplicate query. Also returns ALL users including admin (no filter). Field 'phone/salary/hire_date' may be missing for seeded admin (returned as empty).

Allows 'admin' role but admin role is allowed via check 'in [admin, inventory_manager]'. Works but UserBase.role default is 'cashier' - register endpoint doesn't validate role enum, any string accepted.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby on DialogContent (shadcn a11y) - non-blocking but should add DialogDescription
Recharts container reports width(-1) height(-1) warning when no data - charts area renders but charts have 0 dimensions until parent has rendered. Add minHeight to ResponsiveContainer parent.

action_items: (Optional) Tighten CORS: remove '*' wildcard since allow_credentials=True is set
(Optional) Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to all DialogContent usages to silence a11y warning
(Optional) Set minHeight on Recharts ResponsiveContainer parents to avoid width(-1)/height(-1) warnings
critical_code_review_comments: CORS misconfiguration: allow_origins=[FRONTEND_URL, '*'] with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec - browsers will reject. Works currently due to same-origin proxy.
GET /api/employees runs db.users.find() twice unnecessarily and returns all users (including admin) without role filtering. Refactor to single query.
Backend doesn't validate role enum values - any string passes through Pydantic. Consider Literal['admin','cashier','inventory_manager'].
server.py is 827 lines - approaching the 700 line guideline. Consider splitting into modules: auth.py, products.py, suppliers.py, sales.py, reports.py.
POST /api/auth/register is unauthenticated and accepts any role including 'admin' - security risk. Should require admin auth for role!=cashier.
seed_data_creation: Test product 'Test Milk' (SKU: MILK<timestamp>) and supplier 'Fresh Farms' created via UI; product cleanup via pytest delete tests; UI-created seed data remains in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP flows pass. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth/products/suppliers/employees/categories/reports/sales. UI flows tested: login -> dashboard -> inventory add -> suppliers add -> POS (shows added products) -> employees -> reports. No critical bugs. Minor concerns: CORS wildcard with credentials, unauthenticated /api/auth/register can create admin, server.py size, missing DialogDescription a11y, Recharts width warning when empty data.
